title: Location Sheet + Triage + Ambulance Sprite Fixes
summary: Location sheet improvements, triage text input fix, and ambulance now faces user location

changes.message: Fixed search mode missing 'Enter manually' button - now always available
Fixed manual input hidden under keyboard on iOS - auto-scrolls to active field
Added 'Use device location' restore option in search when using manual pickup
Search query now clears when switching to manual entry
Keyboard dismisses before navigating back from manual entry
New OTA update changelog - see what's new before restarting
Liquid glass UI polish on update modal with squircle buttons
Fixed triage text input - space bar works, no more cursor jumps during typing
Fixed ambulance starting sprite - now faces user's pickup location, not north
